programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el estreno de la octava temporada, con Paloma Reynosa aún suelta, Gibbs debe tomar medidas desesperadas para proteger a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña se convierte en algo más grande cuando su abuelo complica la investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los motivos de un atentado contra una técnica de explosivos la relacionan con un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS investiga su muy reservada vida personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect wanted for brandishing a knife squares up with Officers. A passenger learns the hard way that a friend offered him a ride in a stolen Jeep. A young driver is caught with magic mushrooms.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies respond to an armed carjacking, an altercation leads to a woman's arrest, and officers face a combative man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones

programme.title: Rico o muerto

programme.title: Ritmo de un sueño

programme.title: Viaje censurado

programme.title: ¿Qué le dijiste a Dios?

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: The Good Boss
programme.desc: Oscar winner Javier Bardem is a charismatic factory owner in this irreverent workplace comedy who crosses every imaginable ethical line to win a coveted Business Excellence award. Shortlisted for the 2022 Oscar for Best International Feature Film.

programme.title: No Rest For The Wicked
programme.desc: While attempting to cover his tracks from a violent shooting, a crooked cop uncovers a deadly plot that he is uniquely qualified to prevent in this taut, award-winning thriller.

programme.title: Los domésticos
programme.desc: Un matrimonio busca refugio en un mundo apocalíptico controlado por malvadas pandillas. Una de estas depravadas pandillas pone a la pareja en la mira, por lo que ellos harán lo que sea para sobrevivir.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Operación Overlord

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Candyman: el terror
programme.desc: Secuela de CANDYMAN, ambientada en Nueva Orleans. Un maestro de escuela descubre el vínculo entre una serie de asesinatos misteriosos y el espíritu de un esclavo asesinado injustamente.

programme.desc: A professional gambler purchases a ranch via mail order, only to find it is a front for cattle rustlers.

programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance

programme.desc: Meeting a stranger in a railway station, a woman is tempted to cheat on her husband.

programme.desc: A famous cat burglar who has retired to the Riviera catches a thief imitating his old style.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The sister of a man who died after robbing a bank when a bomb that was placed around his neck detonated talks about the case.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: I Love New York: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30-minute special episode, NY hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite guys from the series.

programme.title: I Love New York: Rasta Finale
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a tense elimination in Miami, it's down to New York's final two suitors. They accompany New York to the tropics of Jamaica for the final showdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Sumthin's Stinkin' in the House of Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 new women to his mansion with the hope of finding someone “real” this time around.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: College wrestler-turned-professional MMA fighter Michael Chandler proves just how tough he is when he enters the cage with The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbekli Tepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history go back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.desc: Veteran archaeologist Ned Kelly and a team of scientists investigate the find of a mummified body in the boglands of Cashel, Ireland.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: The explorers find themselves trapped on the plateau high above the Amazon jungle, surrounded by prehistoric horrors.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex escorts a pretty socialite to a dance at her country club.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex heads the household when Elyse and Steven go away for the weekend.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jennifer gets picked on when she befriends a boy at school.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Seduced by an "older woman" of twenty-one, the hitherto inexperienced Alex is devastated to learn that she thinks of their relationship as casual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A visit from Steven's father evokes confrontation between the two.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An abrasive Dr. John Porter arrives in town after hearing of the discovery of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike becomes the substitute school teacher, the town gets upset when she teaches the children about evolution.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully convince Chief Black Kettle that he should move his starving people to a new reservation. Dr. Mike and Sully are both working on wedding presents for each other.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully have second thoughts about their love for one another as they recall their tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage, and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection

programme.title: Firewalker

programme.title: Fist of Fury

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es una linda mañana y Dora quiere saludar a sus hermanitos bebés. Cuando Dora llega a su habitación, ellos no estaban en sus cunas. Se habían subido al carrito y estaban en peligro.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora continúa con su misión. La única manera de deshacer el hechizo de la bruja malvada y despertar a Botas, es si Dora se convierte en una verdadera princesa y le da un abrazo al mono. ¡Ayúdala a completar su misión!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora compra un muñeco de resorte a sus hermanitos que están enfermos. Únete a Dora y Botas en su viaje de regreso a casa y conoce a Helena, la amiga rusa de Dora.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora tiene una gran sorpresa para su cachorro, Perrito, por el día de los gemelos. Ayuda a Dora, Botas y Perrito en una aventura para encontrar el gemelo de Perrito y descubrir quién es su dueño.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Es el día de los Reyes Magos! Dora, Botas y Diego se disfrazan como reyes y se dirigen a la fiesta, pero necesitarán tu ayuda cuando Zorro aparece y espanta a los animales del lugar.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Las botas de Botas han regresado del zapatero pero cuando se las prueba empieza a rebotar por todas partes. ¡Son otras botas! Dora y tu deben ayudarlo a encontrar sus botas en una aventura saltarina.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the SG-1 team reports in from a brutal mission, they discover that their fifth team member -- Lt. Tyler -- may not actually have been real. Does this mean the end of the Stargate Program? If the Pentagon's Col. Simmons has his way, it will.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team is welcomed on K'Tau by the planet's religious leader, who takes the reddening sky concurrent with their arrival as a sign from their gods. What he doesn't know is that the reddish color is signaling the planet's impending doom!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the eve of her birthday, Cassandra is showing signs of mind fire, a powerful electromagnetic field triggered at puberty. Now SG-1 must find a cure to stop the life-threatening changes before she destroys herself…and the command center!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel's Unas friend, Chaka (Dion Johnstone), is captured by a pre-industrial civilization that uses Unas as slaves. While attempting to free Chaka from this cruel regime, Daniel risks the safety of SG-1, and possibly the life of his friend.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a rescue mission to recover Russian soldiers believed missing in action on a previously undisclosed trip, the SG-1 team gets trapped in a Goa'uld tomb with a number of decomposed bodies…and a deadly alien monster with an appetite for human flesh!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns to Tollana for the funeral of Chancellor Omoc, only to discover the rulers have reversed their policy on technology sharing and will now trade advanced weaponry with Earth. But is there a secret agenda behind the gesture?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod pick up what may be the best of the worst in Buena Park, Calif.; Kenny and his cousin glide through a half-decent locker; Ivy comes to the auction dressed to kill; Mary tries to turn up the volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry brings along a butler when the bidders visit Orange, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi score a vintage lamp; Darrell sets a record for the most money spent on a unit in the show's history.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy searches for high-end lockers; Rene and Casey clash over purchases; things get hairy for Jarrod and Brandi; Darrell plays old-fashioned pranks on his rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary finally locates a vintage goodie in El Monte, Calif.; Ivy uncovers decades-old family fun; Darrell revisits a childhood pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod hopes that scoring more lockers will prevent Brandi from closing the store in Long Beach; Ivy attempts to intimidate the other bidders; Rene's cockiness could prove to be a detriment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: There are roses for some and thorns for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; Dave arrives with unanticipated optimism, but that doesn't stop him from stirring up trouble; Ivy has to pound unfamiliar pavement.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders venture back to San Bernardino, Calif.; Barry arrives bearing gifts; Dave makes a tidy profit; Darrell and Brandon score big with an old item.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A visit to Torrance, Calif., yields only a few quality units; Jarrod purchases a locker that forces Brandi to face her fears; Ivy tries a new approach; Rene gives two new buyers the business.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to climb his way to success; Kenny tries to honor the history of San Bernardino, Calif., recording a win along the way; Brandi shows her literary prowess volume by volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Highlights from past episodes of the series focus on the biggest conflicts between the buyers, including Dave Hester.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers visit a facility in Moreno Valley, Calif., that is known for its great scores; Ivy and Rene both land jam-packed units, but only one provides a huge payday.

programme.desc: The buyers look for south-of-the-border treasure in San Diego; Rene and Casey defend their home turf against Darrell and Brandon; Mary eyes a high-end household unit; Ivy brings two extra Calvins to the festivities.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life. Extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: The Badlands' deadliest Clipper, Sunny, rescues a mysterious boy, M.K., who harbors a dark secret, but may also know the way out of the Badlands.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: M.K. finds refuge in an unlikely and dangerous place, while Sunny's loyalty is tested when Quinn tries to force him to commit an unspeakable act.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: As Sunny begins to train M.K., the boy struggles to learn discipline. Meanwhile, Quinn seeks retribution against The Widow and faces the consequences.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and M.K. try to figure out how to control the boy's power, while Quinn sets a dangerous parlay with a rival Baron to help fight The Widow.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: As Sunny secures his escape from the Fort, Quinn grows suspicious, while The Widow's decisions set her on a collision course with Sunny and M.K.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and M.K. fight to escape Quinn's grip once and for all, while the Baron's enemies conspire to take him down and change the Badlands forever.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Tea Party
programme.desc: The girls are planning a spring tea in honor of Lord Cucuface and the trustees when Sugar Dimples, the child movie star, drops in to visit and takes over.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline in Cannes
programme.desc: When Madeline's sinuses act up, Dr. Cohn suggests she go someplace warm, so Lord Cucuface sends the girls to Cannes.

programme.desc: When Lord Cucuface becomes suddenly indisposed, Madeline takes over his mission to impress some American tourists who are potential donors to the girls' school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline on Stage
programme.desc: When Miss Clavel brings in a method acting teacher to direct the girls in a play, Madeline is sure she will get the leading role.

programme.desc: Nicole is embarrassed when she is asked to read a letter from her aunt, and it is revealed that her reading skills aren't as developed as the other girls.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Fashion Show
programme.desc: When Madeline and the girls are given the opportunity to be high fashion models and meet the top designer Mme. Cliche, they are asked to wear creations made of cheese.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at the Hotel Riche
programme.desc: When the pipes burst and the old house is closed for a plumbing overhaul, Madeline and the girls move into Lord Cucuface's lavish suite at the Ritz.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline's Halloween
programme.desc: When Madeline and the girls go to New York to meet their culturally diverse penpals and celebrate Halloween, Madeline finds some mysterious spider earrings in her trick or treat bag.

programme.desc: While touring Versailles with Miss Clavel and the girls, Pepito disobeys a Do Not Touch sign, and leaves fingerprints of mud and chocolate on a priceless harpsichord.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline's Manners

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda and Andrea are hired to auction off furniture from an inn that was recently sold, Melinda encounters the mischievous ghosts of three young boys who refuse to leave the inn.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A year after a teenage boy, Jason Shields, dies in a freak accident after discovering he was adopted, Melinda must help him find his birth mother before he can crossover.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a young woman dies following a routine procedure in the operating room, Melinda uncovers the truth that the doctor is secretly suffering from dementia and made a mistake during the women's operation that caused her death.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Jim starts behaving uncharacteristically, Melinda learns Jim is being haunted by the ghost of an ex-con, Julian Borgia, who has been attached to Jim ever since Jim was unable to save Julian's life in route to the hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Soon after Melinda's car is stolen by a troubled teenage boy, Kirk Jensen, Kirk's dead mother, Lacy, sends Melinda messages through Electronic Voice Phenomena (EVP) or "white noise" in her car radio and other electronics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A young bride-to-be is haunted by the dead wife, Ursula, of her fiancé before their upcoming wedding. Melinda learns Ursula died in a car crash on the way to her wedding reception with Mark, and now she can't bear to see Mark marry someone else.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When an up and coming boxing sensation is haunted by the ghost of his mother, whose death caused a rift between him and his father, Melinda must broker peace between them before the mother can crossover.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: While Andrea prepares to do standup at a nearby comedy club that is closing its doors, Melinda encounters a troubled dead stand-up comedian (Marty Golden), who is haunting the old comedy club, along with other dead comics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda's mysterious new neighbor is haunted by an old classmate's dead grandfather, who suspects Tom kidnapped and killed his granddaughter.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an executed prisoner seeks Melinda's help in uncovering a contract for his valuable paintings before they're sold and his estranged daughter and struggling artist doesn't see a penny of what the contract says she is entitled to.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda's first ghost reappears, her presence triggers Melinda to remember when she first discovered her "gift" and the strain it put on her relationship with her mother, who couldn't understand what Melinda was going through.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the ghost of Andrea's friend starts haunting her, Andrea learns that he was hospitalized in a hiking accident and every time he flat lines, his ghost tries to give her clues.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda and Andrea help a workaholic fashion designer Christine Greeneauction her belongings, Melinda discovers Christine and her baby daughter's nanny are being haunted by the malicious ghost of Christine's son Daniel.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a traveling carnival comes to Grandview, Melinda encounters the revengeful ghost of a magician (Edward), who thinks his death during an underwater escape stunt wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: After asking if the castaways feel comfortable in their respective tribes, Jeff announces that it is time for a merge.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Martín despierta en un sanatorio, los empleados de los Reyes reportan normalidad en la hacienda Elizondo; sin embargo, las hermanas deciden comprobar por sus propios medios lo que sucede.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: El administrador del sanatorio descubre quién es Martín y lo manipula para que no diga nada, Hortencia se interesa en él. Sarita, Ruth y Antonio vigilan el rancho Elizondo por las noches.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Llega el día del matrimonio de Guadalupe y Gaspar, al que se espera que asista Eleuterio. Paula arriesga su amor por Juan para salvar a su madre de la cárcel, pero él empieza a sospechar que José está detrás del rechazo de la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Por fin, Lupe y Gaspar se casan y en medio del día más feliz de sus vidas, ella sufre la ausencia de su padre en la boda. Juan encuentra a José borracho presionando a Paula para besarla. Emilio acude al hospital para iniciar el plan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula sale ilesa del ataque de cinco alacranes que encuentra en su cama y, enfurecida, acusa a Julieta, quien niega tener algo que ver con lo sucedido. Pedro la defiende, aunque la nota extraña y agresiva, ella se queja de sufrir dolores de cabeza.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le miente a Juan asegurándole que está enamorada de otro hombre, pero él no le cree y está seguro de que algo esconde. José chantajea y trata de obligar a Beatriz a estar con él. Julieta no sabe la razón de sus acciones, se siente confundida.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucía se encuentra mal. Lucho es detenido cuando trata de buscar a Irene y a la niña. Patricia enfrenta a Inés por mantener relaciones con su esposo. Todos los aliados de Gabriela creen que Alejandro los puede traicionar por ser hijo de la Loba.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica comprueba que Cecilia había recibido un abortivo. La señora Dantés acusa a Antonia y David la enfrenta, cree que lo quiere poner en contra de su abuela. Gabriela sufre por la reacción de su hijo. Comienza el juicio contra Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Un juez comprado dictamina que el Chamuco pertenece a Aníbal Villegas y a Antonia Guerra, y todos protestan. Antonia consigue que liberen a Lucas. Llega Eugenia, alias Brigitte, una hermosa prostituta contratada por Antonia para enamorar a David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia despide a Valentina y a Max, ya no le importan pues todos los documentos han sido firmados. Ellos sufren un accidente. Francisca despierta abruptamente con la sensación de que su hijo ha muerto. Ricardo teme estar volviéndose adicto a Inés.
